title: Roasted Mediterranean Squash Skillet
description: A citrusy and crispy post-workout Mediterranean dish featuring roasted squash, perfect for a flexitarian diet. This skillet is filled with flavors of the Mediterranean and is easy to make.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the squash with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and pepper until coated.
Spread the squash on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes or until tender.
In a large skillet, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute or until fragrant.
Add the chickpeas and cook for 2 minutes or until lightly browned.
Add the roasted squash, lemon juice, and feta cheese to the skillet and stir to combine.
Deglaze the skillet with a little water if needed, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
